title: 16S RC-PCR control samples and mock standards
author: Jordy P.M. Coolen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
16S RC-PCR datasets of control samples and mock standards. 
Produced during the 16S RC-PCR study. 

 Datasets are produced using 2x150 Illumina MiniSeq. 
A short description of each sample is given in the METADATA_zenodo file.
